No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS JANICE KENNEDY AND EMMETT KENNEDY'S Motion To Compel Initial Form Interrogatory Responses From Defendant Universal Protection Services DBA Allied Universal Security With Request For Sanctions.

Motion to compel GRANTED. No timely opposition filed. Complete responses are due to be served no later than August 10, 2022. Objections are waived. CCP 2030.290. Sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $960, payable by August 10, 2022.

The Court will review the proposed order submitted by the prevailing party.
